case_title: DENNIS RAY JONES VS. ZHUD JUN HUANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALLPARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CANTONESE INTERPRETER KENNY FONG PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ZHUD JUN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, DENNIS RAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, ZHUD JUN $1,305.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,305.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CAR IS A TOTAL LOSS, AND AWARDS DAMAGES FOR ITS VALUE, PLUS 7 DAYS OF LOSS OF USE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
